title: Demon Seal prize ladder mis-calibrated: natural RTP ~146%, not 64.4%
description: DemonSealEvaluator's merged prize ladder (T4=$2..T12=$25000) combined with the documented trinomial seal probabilities P(gold)=0.12, P(silver)=0.40, P(broken)=0.48 yields a natural-draw RTP of ~146% (computed exactly: EV per $5 ticket = $7.33). This violates the 'payout ratio sacred / house always wins' core invariant — players would win on average. BLUEPRINT.md section 3.2 claims 64.4% but its per-tier P(T) table does not sum to 1.0 (totals ~86%) and does not follow from the stated trinomial formula. The blueprint pool counts likewise sum to ~149% RTP. Fix requires re-calibrating the prize ladder (touches dbm.17 DemonSealEvaluator + dbm.16 populator ladder) or the seal probabilities, under game-math-engineer. Surfaced while implementing dbm.23 Monte Carlo suite, which now asserts simulation-matches-model (the honest ~146%) rather than the incorrect 64.4%.
close_reason: Resolved: not a code defect. Demon Seal is a pre-allocated pool — RTP is set by PoolContract tier counts, and the populator constructs seals to hit a predetermined T (no independent draws). The ~146% was an invalid independent-seal model. Fixed: game-math skill P(T) table recalibrated to sum to 1.0 (loss T0-3=0.56708); DemonSealMonteCarloTest now asserts the pool RTP ~64.4% (closed-form) + 2-sigma distribution. Populator/evaluator unchanged.

title: DemonSealEvaluator
description: Computes T=2G+S over 6 seals, maps T->tier (Escapes/Consolation/Sealed/Killed) per calibration (RTP 64.4%). Implements WinEvaluator.
close_reason: Closed

title: DemonSealPopulator
description: Trinomial 6 seals (P gold .12, silver .40, broken .48), T=2G+S. Constructive(T): enumerate (g,s,b) with 2g+s=T & g+s+b=6, build [g GOLD,s SILVER,b BROKEN], Fisher-Yates, verify sum=T. Implements GridPopulator.
close_reason: Closed

title: CelestialFortuneMechanic
description: GameMechanic factory bundling CelestialFortunePopulator + Evaluator, type CELESTIAL_FORTUNE, default symbol/number pool.
close_reason: Closed

title: CelestialFortuneEvaluator
description: Counts overlap k between player picks and winning numbers, maps k->prize tier per calibration (RTP 65.2%). Implements WinEvaluator.
close_reason: Closed

title: CelestialFortunePopulator
description: Hypergeometric (N=30,m=8,n=4). Constructive winner(k): pick k from winning set, fill 8-k from complement. Loser: all 8 from complement (zero overlap). Implements GridPopulator.
close_reason: Closed

title: PoolFactory
description: create(Builder)->PoolContract (validates, computes LosingTier, throws InvalidPoolException). createWithAutoBalance(...) adjusts lowest tier count to make math fit. Uses PoolValidator internally.
close_reason: Implemented PoolFactory in com.luckledger.domain.pool (luckledger-domain). create(Builder) validates via PoolValidator and throws InvalidPoolException; createWithAutoBalance recomputes the lowest-value tier's count so winning tiers consume the prize budget exactly. No LosingTier class created: PrizeTier is a record requiring value>0 and PoolContract derives losers via getLoserCount()/getFloorCost(), so the DESIGN's 'LosingTier extends PrizeTier' was deliberately not built. Merged dep branch ay2.7 (PoolContract+PoolValidator) which were closed but not on main.

title: PoolValidator service
description: validate(PoolContract)->ValidationResult. 7 checks: tierCost+floorCost==prizeBudget (tolerance), every tier.count>0, every tier.value>minPayout, totalTickets>0, payoutRatio in (0,1), loserCount>=0, no duplicate tier.value.
close_reason: Closed

title: Demon Seal near-miss analyzer (point-accumulation)
description: NearMissAnalyzer.analyze throws for DEMON_SEAL (match-count model only), so VerificationSuite.analyzeNearMisses silently reports zero near-misses for Demon Seal. Add a point-accumulation path: T=2*gold+silver, win at T>=4, near-miss when T==3 (one point short), distance=4-T for losers. Flagged during dv8.4.
close_reason: NearMissAnalyzer now has a Demon Seal point-accumulation path (T=2g+s, near-miss at T==3, distance=4-T). VerificationSuite.analyzeNearMisses no longer degrades for Demon Seal. NearMissAnalyzerTest 42, full reactor green.

title: GlobalExceptionHandler
description: @RestControllerAdvice mapping domain exceptions to the {error,code} envelope and status codes 402/403/404/409/410/422/500/503.

title: GameOrchestrator
description: setup(GameConfig)->GameSetupResult: PoolFactory.create -> GenerationPipeline.generate -> BookPartitioner.partition -> DealerRegistry.initializeDealers -> DealerAllocator.allocate. restockCycle(config) re-stocks existing dealers. Thin orchestrator; constructor-injects all five subsystem services.
close_reason: GameOrchestrator on main; tests green

title: GenerationPipeline orchestrator
description: generate(pool, mechanicType, theme)->GenerationResult: validate -> generate outcomes -> shuffle -> populate layouts -> verify (throw GenerationIntegrityException on fail) -> skin -> assemble. Constructor-injects OutcomeGenerator, ShuffleService, GameMechanic, ThemeSkinningService, VerificationSuite (DI on interfaces).
close_reason: GenerationPipeline orchestrator in luckledger-generation: outcomes->shuffle->populate->verify(throws GenerationIntegrityException on fail)->skin->assemble GenerationResult. DI of OutcomeGenerator/ShuffleService/GameMechanic/ThemeSkinningService/VerificationSuite + GridSize. 5 end-to-end tests.
